overall.description: First-person traversal through a vast snowy mountain landscape in a video game. The player moves through snow-covered terrain with scattered rocks, revealing expansive mountain ranges and valleys under a clear blue sky. Game UI prompts for interaction are visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: traversing snow-covered terrain, moving past scattered boulders on the right side

entered.detail: expansive white snow terrain filling the foreground and midground
large snow-capped mountain peak dominating the distant view
tan-colored rocks partially buried in snow along the right path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving through a pristine snow-covered field. Large snow-capped mountains dominate the background while scattered boulders line the right side of the path. The clear blue sky and bright sunlight create high contrast across the white terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow valley with distant mountain range

events.description: camera pans left revealing expansive snow-filled valley and distant mountain range

agents.ego_description: turning to survey the mountain valley while continuing to move forward through the snow

entered.detail: wide snow-filled valley between mountain ranges
rugged snow-covered mountains forming the valley wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal a breathtaking snow-filled valley surrounded by distant mountain ranges. The main peak from the previous view moves out of frame as the player continues traversing the open terrain, with the expansive valley now dominating the vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow plateau with ascending ridge

events.description: character shadow becomes visible on snow surface indicating sun position

agents.ego_description: crossing the open snow plateau toward an ascending ridge, shadow visible on the snow surface

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peak with visible rock faces
snow-covered ridge line rising toward the peak

segments.scene_description: The player continues across the open snow plateau, approaching an ascending ridge. A character shadow appears on the snow around the 35-second mark, and the distant mountain range gives way to closer peaks as the terrain begins to slope upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snow slope with rocky outcrops

events.description: begin ascending steeper snow-covered slope toward ridge line

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep snow slope, navigating past rocky outcrops on the right side

entered.detail: large exposed rock formation breaking through the snow on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player ascending a steep snow-covered slope toward a ridge line. Rocky outcrops appear on the right side of the frame, and the terrain becomes more rugged as the elevation increases, with the ridge drawing closer as the climb continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person traversal across a pristine snowy plateau that gradually ascends into a rugged mountain ridge. It begins by moving through a bright, snow-covered field flanked by scattered boulders under a high-contrast blue sky. As the camera turns left, the initial peaks shift out of frame to reveal a breathtaking, expansive snow-filled valley surrounded by distant mountain ranges. The scene then transitions across the open plateau toward an ascending ridge, where a character shadow appears on the snow as the distant horizon gives way to closer, looming peaks. Finally, the camera climbs a steep, snow-covered slope, passing rocky outcrops as the terrain becomes increasingly rugged during the ascent toward the ridge line.
